justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces, updates Spring to 6.x and Hibernate to 6.x, and modernizes the compiler plugin to use <release> instead of <source>/<target>. It also replaces deprecated @RequestMapping with @PostMapping. However, it does not leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is capped at 4. The migration is clean and coherent with no spurious changes.
